result:
Both files are done and every constraint verifies mechanically.

**`REPORT.md`**
- Exactly four H2 headings in the required order, no other headings — ✓
- 154 words (≤ 250) — ✓
- Overview states total revenue as `$7,154.44` and 30 orders — ✓
- Recommendations has exactly 3 bullets (17/15/13 words, each ≤ 25), grounded in the data — ✓
- None of the banned words present — ✓

**`summary.json`** — exactly the five required keys:
- `total_revenue`: 7154.44
- `orders`: 30
- `median_order_value`: 204.94 (even count → mean of the two middle orders, 190.00 and 219.89)
- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00, the highest)
- `revenue_by_region`: all four regions — North 2176.35, South 1732.48, East 1830.79, West 1414.82

All numbers were computed directly from `data/sales.csv` (30 orders), no commits made, work confined to the current directory.
